title: hieracium angustiforme
intro: Hieracium angustiforme, also known as narrow-leaved hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium angustiforme include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Hieracium angustiforme is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
